---
title: "Golf Swing Analyzer MVP"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="analyzer-container fade-in">
  <p class="description">Upload a prerecorded video of your golf swing to receive real-time posture analysis. <strong>100% Private</strong>: all processing is done locally in your browser using Google's MediaPipe Vision API. You can check out the repo here: <a href="https://github.com/Eric-Wong97/golf-swing-analyzer">https://github.com/Eric-Wong97/golf-swing-analyzer</a></p>

  <div class="upload-section">
    <label for="video-upload" class="upload-btn">
      <i class="bi bi-upload"></i> Select Video
    </label>
    <input type="file" id="video-upload" accept="video/*" style="display: none;">
    <span id="file-name" class="file-name">No file chosen</span>
  </div>

  <div id="loading-indicator" class="loading-indicator" style="display: none;">
    <div class="spinner-border text-primary" role="status">
      <span class="visually-hidden">Loading Model...</span>
    </div>
    <span class="ms-2">Initializing AI Model...</span>
  </div>

  <div class="workspace">
    <div class="video-wrapper">
      <video id="video-element" controls playsinline style="display: none;"></video>
      <canvas id="output-canvas"></canvas>
      <canvas id="line-canvas"></canvas>
      <div class="drawing-controls">
        <button id="toggle-drawing" class="drawing-btn">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil"></i> Draw Lines
        </button>
        <button id="undo-drawing" class="drawing-btn" style="display: none;" disabled>
          <i class="bi bi-arrow-counterclockwise"></i> Undo
        </button>
        <button id="redo-drawing" class="drawing-btn" style="display: none;" disabled>
          <i class="bi bi-arrow-clockwise"></i> Redo
        </button>
        <button id="clear-drawing" class="drawing-btn" style="display: none;">
          <i class="bi bi-trash"></i> Clear
        </button>
        <input type="color" id="line-color" value="#ffff00" style="display: none;">
      </div>
    </div>
    
    <div class="dashboard">
      <h3>Analysis Dashboard</h3>
      
      <div class="metric-card">
        <h4>Lead Arm Straightness</h4>
        <div class="metric-value" id="arm-angle">--&deg;</div>
        <div class="recommendation" id="arm-rec">Waiting for video...</div>
      </div>
      
      <div class="metric-card">
        <h4>Athletic Posture (Knees)</h4>
        <div class="metric-value" id="knee-angle">--&deg;</div>
        <div class="recommendation" id="knee-rec">Waiting for video...</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="performance-report" id="performance-report" style="display: none;">
    <div class="report-header">
      <h3>
        <i class="bi bi-clipboard-data"></i> Complete Performance Report
      </h3>
      <button id="export-report" class="export-btn">
        <i class="bi bi-download"></i> Export Report
      </button>
    </div>
    
    <div class="report-content">
      <div class="report-section">
        <h4>Session Summary</h4>
        <div class="summary-grid">
          <div class="summary-item">
            <span class="label">Video Duration:</span>
            <span class="value" id="report-duration">--</span>
          </div>
          <div class="summary-item">
            <span class="label">Frames Analyzed:</span>
            <span class="value" id="report-frames">--</span>
          </div>
          <div class="summary-item">
            <span class="label">Detection Rate:</span>
            <span class="value" id="report-detection">--</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="report-section">
        <h4>Lead Arm Analysis</h4>
        <div class="metrics-grid">
          <div class="metric-item">
            <span class="label">Current Angle:</span>
            <span class="value" id="report-arm-current">--°</span>
          </div>
          <div class="metric-item">
            <span class="label">Average Angle:</span>
            <span class="value" id="report-arm-avg">--°</span>
          </div>
          <div class="metric-item">
            <span class="label">Min Angle:</span>
            <span class="value" id="report-arm-min">--°</span>
          </div>
          <div class="metric-item">
            <span class="label">Max Angle:</span>
            <span class="value" id="report-arm-max">--°</span>
          </div>
          <div class="metric-item full-width">
            <span class="label">Threshold:</span>
            <span class="value">≥ 160° (Good)</span>
          </div>
          <div class="metric-item full-width">
            <span class="label">Assessment:</span>
            <span class="value" id="report-arm-assessment">--</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="report-section">
        <h4>Knee Posture Analysis</h4>
        <div class="metrics-grid">
          <div class="metric-item">
            <span class="label">Current Angle:</span>
            <span class="value" id="report-knee-current">--°</span>
          </div>
          <div class="metric-item">
            <span class="label">Average Angle:</span>
            <span class="value" id="report-knee-avg">--°</span>
          </div>
          <div class="metric-item">
            <span class="label">Min Angle:</span>
            <span class="value" id="report-knee-min">--°</span>
          </div>
          <div class="metric-item">
            <span class="label">Max Angle:</span>
            <span class="value" id="report-knee-max">--°</span>
          </div>
          <div class="metric-item full-width">
            <span class="label">Optimal Range:</span>
            <span class="value">130° - 170° (Good Athletic Posture)</span>
          </div>
          <div class="metric-item full-width">
            <span class="label">Assessment:</span>
            <span class="value" id="report-knee-assessment">--</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="report-section">
        <h4>Key Recommendations</h4>
        <ul class="recommendations-list" id="recommendations-list">
          <li>Upload a video to generate recommendations</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

<style>
  .analyzer-container {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 1320px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 2rem 1.25rem;
  }
  
  .description {
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
    color: var(--bs-body-color);
  }
  
  .upload-section {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 1rem;
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
  }
  
  .upload-btn {
    background: var(--primary);
    color: white;
    padding: 0.5rem 1.5rem;
    border-radius: 8px;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-weight: 500;
    transition: all 0.2s ease-in-out;
  }
  
  .upload-btn:hover {
    filter: brightness(1.1);
    transform: translateY(-2px);
  }
  
  .file-name {
    font-family: monospace;
    color: #6c757d;
  }

  .workspace {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    gap: 2rem;
    align-items: start;
  }
  
  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    .workspace {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }
  }

  .video-wrapper {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 1280px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    background: #000;
    border-radius: 12px;
    overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
    aspect-ratio: 16/9;
  }

  video {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: contain;
  }

  canvas {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: contain;
    pointer-events: none;
    touch-action: none;
    z-index: 2;
  }

  #line-canvas {
    z-index: 3;
  }

  .drawing-controls {
    position: absolute;
    top: 50%;
    left: 1rem;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0.4rem;
    align-items: center;
    z-index: 10;
  }

  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    .drawing-controls {
      top: auto;
      left: 0.75rem;
      bottom: 0.75rem;
      transform: none;
      flex-direction: row;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      justify-content: flex-start;
    }
  }

  .drawing-btn {
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9);
    color: #333;
    border: none;
    padding: 0.5rem 1rem;
    border-radius: 6px;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-weight: 500;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.5rem;
  }

  .drawing-btn:hover {
    background: white;
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
  }

  .drawing-btn.active {
    background: var(--primary);
    color: white;
  }

  .drawing-btn:disabled {
    opacity: 0.55;
    cursor: not-allowed;
    transform: none;
    box-shadow: none;
  }

  #line-color {
    width: 40px;
    height: 40px;
    border: 2px solid white;
    border-radius: 6px;
    cursor: pointer;
  }

  .dashboard {
    background: var(--bs-body-bg);
    border: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color);
    padding: 1.5rem;
    border-radius: 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
  }

  .dashboard h3 {
    margin-top: 0;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    font-weight: 600;
  }

  .metric-card {
    background: var(--bs-secondary-bg);
    padding: 1.5rem;
    border-radius: 10px;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }
  
  .metric-card h4 {
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    color: #6c757d;
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  }

  .metric-value {
    font-size: 2.5rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    font-family: monospace;
  }

  .recommendation {
    font-weight: 500;
    padding: 0.5rem;
    border-radius: 6px;
    text-align: center;
  }
  
  .rec-good {
    background: rgba(40, 167, 69, 0.1);
    color: #28a745;
  }
  
  .rec-bad {
    background: rgba(220, 53, 69, 0.1);
    color: #dc3545;
  }

  .performance-report {
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 3rem auto 0;
    background: var(--bs-body-bg);
    border: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color);
    border-radius: 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .report-header {
    background: var(--bs-primary);
    color: white;
    padding: 1.5rem;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
  }

  .report-header h3 {
    margin: 0;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.5rem;
  }

  .export-btn {
    background: white;
    color: var(--bs-primary);
    border: none;
    padding: 0.5rem 1.5rem;
    border-radius: 6px;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-weight: 500;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.5rem;
  }

  .export-btn:hover {
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
  }

  .report-content {
    padding: 2rem;
  }

  .report-section {
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
    padding-bottom: 2rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color);
  }

  .report-section:last-child {
    border-bottom: none;
    margin-bottom: 0;
  }

  .report-section h4 {
    margin-top: 0;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--bs-primary);
  }

  .summary-grid,
  .metrics-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr));
    gap: 1rem;
  }

  .summary-item,
  .metric-item {
    background: var(--bs-secondary-bg);
    padding: 1rem;
    border-radius: 8px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0.5rem;
  }

  .metric-item.full-width {
    grid-column: 1 / -1;
  }

  .summary-item .label,
  .metric-item .label {
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    color: #6c757d;
    font-weight: 500;
  }

  .summary-item .value,
  .metric-item .value {
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-family: monospace;
  }

  .recommendations-list {
    list-style: none;
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
  }

  .recommendations-list li {
    background: var(--bs-secondary-bg);
    padding: 1rem;
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    border-radius: 8px;
    border-left: 4px solid var(--bs-primary);
  }

  .recommendations-list li.warning {
    border-left-color: #dc3545;
    background: rgba(220, 53, 69, 0.05);
  }

  .recommendations-list li.success {
    border-left-color: #28a745;
    background: rgba(40, 167, 69, 0.05);
  }
</style>

<script type="module">
import {
  PoseLandmarker,
  FilesetResolver,
  DrawingUtils
} from "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@mediapipe/tasks-vision@0.10.0";

const videoUpload = document.getElementById("video-upload");
const fileName = document.getElementById("file-name");
const videoElement = document.getElementById("video-element");
const canvasElement = document.getElementById("output-canvas");
const canvasCtx = canvasElement.getContext("2d");
const lineCanvasElement = document.getElementById("line-canvas");
const lineCanvasCtx = lineCanvasElement.getContext("2d");
const loadingIndicator = document.getElementById("loading-indicator");

const armAngleEl = document.getElementById("arm-angle");
const armRecEl = document.getElementById("arm-rec");
const kneeAngleEl = document.getElementById("knee-angle");
const kneeRecEl = document.getElementById("knee-rec");

// Drawing controls
const toggleDrawingBtn = document.getElementById("toggle-drawing");
const undoDrawingBtn = document.getElementById("undo-drawing");
const redoDrawingBtn = document.getElementById("redo-drawing");
const clearDrawingBtn = document.getElementById("clear-drawing");
const lineColorPicker = document.getElementById("line-color");

// Report elements
const performanceReport = document.getElementById("performance-report");
const exportReportBtn = document.getElementById("export-report");

let poseLandmarker = undefined;
let runningMode = "VIDEO";
let lastVideoTime = -1;
let isModelLoading = false;

// Drawing state
let isDrawingMode = false;
let drawnLines = [];
let redoLines = [];
let pendingLineStart = null;
let pointerPreview = null;

// Performance tracking
let performanceData = {
  armAngles: [],
  kneeAngles: [],
  totalFrames: 0,
  detectedFrames: 0,
  startTime: null,
  duration: 0
};

// Geometry Math Ported from Python
function calculateAngle(a, b, c) {
  const radians = Math.atan2(c.y - b.y, c.x - b.x) - Math.atan2(a.y - b.y, a.x - b.x);
  let angle = Math.abs(radians * 180.0 / Math.PI);
  if (angle > 180.0) {
    angle = 360 - angle;
  }
  return angle;
}

function updateRecommendationUI(el, isGood, goodText, badText) {
  el.textContent = isGood ? goodText : badText;
  el.className = "recommendation " + (isGood ? "rec-good" : "rec-bad");
}

function resetPerformanceData() {
  performanceData = {
    armAngles: [],
    kneeAngles: [],
    totalFrames: 0,
    detectedFrames: 0,
    startTime: performance.now(),
    duration: 0
  };
}

function updatePerformanceReport() {
  if (performanceData.armAngles.length === 0) return;
  
  // Show report
  performanceReport.style.display = "block";
  
  // Session summary
  document.getElementById("report-duration").textContent = 
    `${videoElement.duration ? videoElement.duration.toFixed(1) : '--'} seconds`;
  document.getElementById("report-frames").textContent = performanceData.totalFrames;
  document.getElementById("report-detection").textContent = 
    `${((performanceData.detectedFrames / performanceData.totalFrames) * 100).toFixed(1)}%`;
  
  // Arm analysis
  const armAngles = performanceData.armAngles;
  const armAvg = armAngles.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / armAngles.length;
  const armMin = Math.min(...armAngles);
  const armMax = Math.max(...armAngles);
  const armCurrent = armAngles[armAngles.length - 1];
  
  document.getElementById("report-arm-current").textContent = `${Math.round(armCurrent)}°`;
  document.getElementById("report-arm-avg").textContent = `${Math.round(armAvg)}°`;
  document.getElementById("report-arm-min").textContent = `${Math.round(armMin)}°`;
  document.getElementById("report-arm-max").textContent = `${Math.round(armMax)}°`;
  
  const armGoodPercent = (armAngles.filter(a => a >= 160).length / armAngles.length) * 100;
  document.getElementById("report-arm-assessment").textContent = 
    armAvg >= 160 ? `Excellent - ${armGoodPercent.toFixed(0)}% of frames in good range` 
                  : `Needs improvement - Only ${armGoodPercent.toFixed(0)}% of frames in good range`;
  
  // Knee analysis
  const kneeAngles = performanceData.kneeAngles;
  const kneeAvg = kneeAngles.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / kneeAngles.length;
  const kneeMin = Math.min(...kneeAngles);
  const kneeMax = Math.max(...kneeAngles);
  const kneeCurrent = kneeAngles[kneeAngles.length - 1];
  
  document.getElementById("report-knee-current").textContent = `${Math.round(kneeCurrent)}°`;
  document.getElementById("report-knee-avg").textContent = `${Math.round(kneeAvg)}°`;
  document.getElementById("report-knee-min").textContent = `${Math.round(kneeMin)}°`;
  document.getElementById("report-knee-max").textContent = `${Math.round(kneeMax)}°`;
  
  const kneeGoodPercent = (kneeAngles.filter(k => k >= 130 && k <= 170).length / kneeAngles.length) * 100;
  document.getElementById("report-knee-assessment").textContent = 
    kneeAvg >= 130 && kneeAvg <= 170 
      ? `Excellent - ${kneeGoodPercent.toFixed(0)}% of frames in optimal range` 
      : `Needs adjustment - Only ${kneeGoodPercent.toFixed(0)}% of frames in optimal range`;
  
  // Generate recommendations
  const recommendations = [];
  if (armAvg < 160) {
    recommendations.push({
      text: `Focus on keeping your lead arm straighter. Average angle was ${Math.round(armAvg)}°, target is ≥160°.`,
      type: 'warning'
    });
  } else {
    recommendations.push({
      text: `Great job maintaining lead arm straightness! Average ${Math.round(armAvg)}° is in the optimal range.`,
      type: 'success'
    });
  }
  
  if (kneeAvg < 130) {
    recommendations.push({
      text: `Your knees are too bent. Try to straighten them slightly. Average was ${Math.round(kneeAvg)}°, optimal is 130-170°.`,
      type: 'warning'
    });
  } else if (kneeAvg > 170) {
    recommendations.push({
      text: `Add more knee flex for better athletic posture. Average was ${Math.round(kneeAvg)}°, optimal is 130-170°.`,
      type: 'warning'
    });
  } else {
    recommendations.push({
      text: `Perfect knee posture! Average ${Math.round(kneeAvg)}° is in the optimal athletic range.`,
      type: 'success'
    });
  }
  
  // Consistency check
  const armRange = armMax - armMin;
  if (armRange > 30) {
    recommendations.push({
      text: `Work on consistency - your lead arm angle varied by ${Math.round(armRange)}° throughout the swing.`,
      type: 'warning'
    });
  }
  
  const recList = document.getElementById("recommendations-list");
  recList.innerHTML = recommendations.map(rec => 
    `<li class="${rec.type}">${rec.text}</li>`
  ).join('');
}

async function createPoseLandmarker() {
  if (poseLandmarker) return;
  isModelLoading = true;
  loadingIndicator.style.display = "flex";
  
  const vision = await FilesetResolver.forVisionTasks(
    "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@mediapipe/tasks-vision@0.10.0/wasm"
  );
  
  poseLandmarker = await PoseLandmarker.createFromOptions(vision, {
    baseOptions: {
      modelAssetPath: "https://storage.googleapis.com/mediapipe-models/pose_landmarker/pose_landmarker_lite/float16/1/pose_landmarker_lite.task",
      delegate: "GPU"
    },
    runningMode: runningMode,
    numPoses: 1
  });
  
  isModelLoading = false;
  loadingIndicator.style.display = "none";
}

videoUpload.addEventListener("change", async (event) => {
  const file = event.target.files[0];
  if (!file) return;
  
  fileName.textContent = file.name;
  const fileURL = URL.createObjectURL(file);
  videoElement.src = fileURL;
  videoElement.style.display = "block";
  
  // Reset performance data for new video
  resetPerformanceData();
  performanceReport.style.display = "none";
  drawnLines = [];
  redoLines = [];
  pendingLineStart = null;
  pointerPreview = null;
  updateDrawingButtons();
  redrawLineCanvas();
  
  // Ensure model is loaded before playing
  if (!poseLandmarker && !isModelLoading) {
    await createPoseLandmarker();
  }
});

// Drawing mode toggle
toggleDrawingBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
  isDrawingMode = !isDrawingMode;
  toggleDrawingBtn.classList.toggle("active");
  undoDrawingBtn.style.display = isDrawingMode ? "block" : "none";
  redoDrawingBtn.style.display = isDrawingMode ? "block" : "none";
  clearDrawingBtn.style.display = isDrawingMode ? "block" : "none";
  lineColorPicker.style.display = isDrawingMode ? "block" : "none";
  lineCanvasElement.style.pointerEvents = isDrawingMode ? "auto" : "none";
  lineCanvasElement.style.cursor = isDrawingMode ? "crosshair" : "default";
  updateDrawingButtons();
  if (!isDrawingMode) {
    pendingLineStart = null;
    pointerPreview = null;
    redrawLineCanvas();
  }
});

clearDrawingBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
  drawnLines = [];
  redoLines = [];
  pendingLineStart = null;
  pointerPreview = null;
  updateDrawingButtons();
  redrawLineCanvas();
});

undoDrawingBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
  if (drawnLines.length === 0) return;
  redoLines.push(drawnLines.pop());
  pendingLineStart = null;
  pointerPreview = null;
  updateDrawingButtons();
  redrawLineCanvas();
});

redoDrawingBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
  if (redoLines.length === 0) return;
  drawnLines.push(redoLines.pop());
  pendingLineStart = null;
  pointerPreview = null;
  updateDrawingButtons();
  redrawLineCanvas();
});

function updateDrawingButtons() {
  undoDrawingBtn.disabled = drawnLines.length === 0;
  redoDrawingBtn.disabled = redoLines.length === 0;
}

function getCanvasPoint(clientX, clientY) {
  const rect = lineCanvasElement.getBoundingClientRect();
  const canvasAspect = lineCanvasElement.width / lineCanvasElement.height;
  const rectAspect = rect.width / rect.height;

  let renderWidth;
  let renderHeight;
  let offsetX;
  let offsetY;

  // Match object-fit: contain geometry so pointer mapping aligns with visible video pixels.
  if (rectAspect > canvasAspect) {
    renderHeight = rect.height;
    renderWidth = renderHeight * canvasAspect;
    offsetX = (rect.width - renderWidth) / 2;
    offsetY = 0;
  } else {
    renderWidth = rect.width;
    renderHeight = renderWidth / canvasAspect;
    offsetX = 0;
    offsetY = (rect.height - renderHeight) / 2;
  }

  const boundedX = Math.min(Math.max(clientX - rect.left - offsetX, 0), renderWidth);
  const boundedY = Math.min(Math.max(clientY - rect.top - offsetY, 0), renderHeight);

  return {
    x: (boundedX / renderWidth) * lineCanvasElement.width,
    y: (boundedY / renderHeight) * lineCanvasElement.height
  };
}

function redrawLineCanvas() {
  lineCanvasCtx.clearRect(0, 0, lineCanvasElement.width, lineCanvasElement.height);

  drawnLines.forEach(line => {
    lineCanvasCtx.strokeStyle = line.color;
    lineCanvasCtx.lineWidth = 4;
    lineCanvasCtx.lineCap = "round";
    lineCanvasCtx.lineJoin = "round";
    lineCanvasCtx.beginPath();
    lineCanvasCtx.moveTo(line.start.x, line.start.y);
    lineCanvasCtx.lineTo(line.end.x, line.end.y);
    lineCanvasCtx.stroke();
  });

  if (isDrawingMode && pendingLineStart && pointerPreview) {
    lineCanvasCtx.strokeStyle = lineColorPicker.value;
    lineCanvasCtx.lineWidth = 4;
    lineCanvasCtx.lineCap = "round";
    lineCanvasCtx.lineJoin = "round";
    lineCanvasCtx.beginPath();
    lineCanvasCtx.moveTo(pendingLineStart.x, pendingLineStart.y);
    lineCanvasCtx.lineTo(pointerPreview.x, pointerPreview.y);
    lineCanvasCtx.stroke();
  }
}

function addOrCompleteLine(point) {
  if (!pendingLineStart) {
    pendingLineStart = point;
    pointerPreview = point;
    return;
  }

  drawnLines.push({
    start: pendingLineStart,
    end: point,
    color: lineColorPicker.value
  });
  redoLines = [];
  pendingLineStart = null;
  pointerPreview = null;
  updateDrawingButtons();
  redrawLineCanvas();
}

// Canvas drawing event handlers (two-click line creation)
lineCanvasElement.addEventListener("pointerdown", (e) => {
  if (!isDrawingMode) return;
  e.preventDefault();
  const point = getCanvasPoint(e.clientX, e.clientY);
  addOrCompleteLine(point);
  redrawLineCanvas();
});

lineCanvasElement.addEventListener("pointermove", (e) => {
  if (!isDrawingMode || !pendingLineStart) return;
  pointerPreview = getCanvasPoint(e.clientX, e.clientY);
  redrawLineCanvas();
});

lineCanvasElement.addEventListener("pointerleave", () => {
  if (!isDrawingMode || !pendingLineStart) return;
  pointerPreview = null;
  redrawLineCanvas();
});

// Export report functionality
exportReportBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
  if (performanceData.armAngles.length === 0) {
    alert("No data to export yet. Please analyze a video first.");
    return;
  }
  
  const armAngles = performanceData.armAngles;
  const kneeAngles = performanceData.kneeAngles;
  const armAvg = armAngles.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / armAngles.length;
  const kneeAvg = kneeAngles.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / kneeAngles.length;
  
  const reportText = `
GOLF SWING ANALYZER - PERFORMANCE REPORT
Generated: ${new Date().toLocaleString()}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

SESSION SUMMARY
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Video Duration: ${videoElement.duration ? videoElement.duration.toFixed(1) : '--'} seconds
Frames Analyzed: ${performanceData.totalFrames}
Detection Rate: ${((performanceData.detectedFrames / performanceData.totalFrames) * 100).toFixed(1)}%

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

LEAD ARM ANALYSIS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Current Angle: ${Math.round(armAngles[armAngles.length - 1])}°
Average Angle: ${Math.round(armAvg)}°
Min Angle: ${Math.round(Math.min(...armAngles))}°
Max Angle: ${Math.round(Math.max(...armAngles))}°
Threshold: ≥ 160° (Good)
Frames in Good Range: ${((armAngles.filter(a => a >= 160).length / armAngles.length) * 100).toFixed(0)}%

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

KNEE POSTURE ANALYSIS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Current Angle: ${Math.round(kneeAngles[kneeAngles.length - 1])}°
Average Angle: ${Math.round(kneeAvg)}°
Min Angle: ${Math.round(Math.min(...kneeAngles))}°
Max Angle: ${Math.round(Math.max(...kneeAngles))}°
Optimal Range: 130° - 170° (Good Athletic Posture)
Frames in Optimal Range: ${((kneeAngles.filter(k => k >= 130 && k <= 170).length / kneeAngles.length) * 100).toFixed(0)}%

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

KEY RECOMMENDATIONS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
${document.getElementById("recommendations-list").innerText}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Generated by Golf Swing Analyzer MVP
Privacy-first, client-side AI analysis
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
`;

  const blob = new Blob([reportText], { type: 'text/plain' });
  const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  const a = document.createElement('a');
  a.href = url;
  a.download = `golf-swing-report-${new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}.txt`;
  document.body.appendChild(a);
  a.click();
  document.body.removeChild(a);
  URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
});

// Setup Canvas dimensions to match video once loaded
videoElement.addEventListener("loadedmetadata", () => {
    canvasElement.width = videoElement.videoWidth;
    canvasElement.height = videoElement.videoHeight;
  lineCanvasElement.width = videoElement.videoWidth;
  lineCanvasElement.height = videoElement.videoHeight;
  redrawLineCanvas();
});

// The main loop
async function renderLoop() {
  if (!poseLandmarker) {
    window.requestAnimationFrame(renderLoop);
    return;
  }

  if (videoElement.readyState >= 2 && videoElement.videoWidth > 0) {
    // Only infer if video time has advanced
    const startTimeMs = performance.now();
    if (lastVideoTime !== videoElement.currentTime) {
      lastVideoTime = videoElement.currentTime;
      performanceData.totalFrames++;
      
      poseLandmarker.detectForVideo(videoElement, startTimeMs, (result) => {
        canvasCtx.save();
        canvasCtx.clearRect(0, 0, canvasElement.width, canvasElement.height);
        
        if (result.landmarks && result.landmarks.length > 0) {
          performanceData.detectedFrames++;
          const landmarks = result.landmarks[0];
          
          // Draw standard skeleton lines
          const drawingUtils = new DrawingUtils(canvasCtx);
          drawingUtils.drawConnectors(landmarks, PoseLandmarker.POSE_CONNECTIONS, {
            color: "#00FF00",
            lineWidth: 2
          });
          drawingUtils.drawLandmarks(landmarks, {
            color: "#FF0000",
            lineWidth: 2,
            radius: 3
          });
          
          // Index mapping: 11 (L Shoulder), 13 (L Elbow), 15 (L Wrist)
          // 23 (L Hip), 25 (L Knee), 27 (L Ankle)
          const lShoulder = landmarks[11];
          const lElbow = landmarks[13];
          const lWrist = landmarks[15];
          const lHip = landmarks[23];
          const lKnee = landmarks[25];
          const lAnkle = landmarks[27];
          
          if (lShoulder && lElbow && lWrist && lHip && lKnee && lAnkle) {
            const armAngle = calculateAngle(lShoulder, lElbow, lWrist);
            const kneeAngle = calculateAngle(lHip, lKnee, lAnkle);
            
            // Track performance data
            performanceData.armAngles.push(armAngle);
            performanceData.kneeAngles.push(kneeAngle);
            
            // Dashboard updates
            armAngleEl.innerHTML = `${Math.round(armAngle)}&deg;`;
            kneeAngleEl.innerHTML = `${Math.round(kneeAngle)}&deg;`;
            
            const isArmGood = armAngle >= 160;
            updateRecommendationUI(armRecEl, isArmGood, "Lead arm straight: GOOD", "Keep lead arm straight!");
            
            let kneeRec = "Knee posture: GOOD";
            let isKneeGood = true;
            if (kneeAngle > 170) {
                kneeRec = "Add knee bend!";
                isKneeGood = false;
            } else if (kneeAngle < 130) {
                kneeRec = "Less knee bend!";
                isKneeGood = false;
            }
            updateRecommendationUI(kneeRecEl, isKneeGood, "Knee posture: GOOD", kneeRec);
            
            // Draw angle overlays on canvas
            canvasCtx.font = "24px 'Courier New', Courier, monospace";
            canvasCtx.fillStyle = "white";
            canvasCtx.strokeStyle = "black";
            canvasCtx.lineWidth = 3;
            
            const elbowX = lElbow.x * canvasElement.width;
            const elbowY = lElbow.y * canvasElement.height;
            canvasCtx.strokeText(`${Math.round(armAngle)}°`, elbowX + 15, elbowY);
            canvasCtx.fillText(`${Math.round(armAngle)}°`, elbowX + 15, elbowY);
            
            const kneeX = lKnee.x * canvasElement.width;
            const kneeY = lKnee.y * canvasElement.height;
            canvasCtx.strokeText(`${Math.round(kneeAngle)}°`, kneeX + 15, kneeY);
            canvasCtx.fillText(`${Math.round(kneeAngle)}°`, kneeX + 15, kneeY);
            
            // Update performance report
            updatePerformanceReport();
          }
        } else {
            // Null state if person goes off camera
            armAngleEl.innerHTML = `--&deg;`;
            kneeAngleEl.innerHTML = `--&deg;`;
            armRecEl.className = "recommendation";
            armRecEl.textContent = "No person detected";
            kneeRecEl.className = "recommendation";
            kneeRecEl.textContent = "No person detected";
        }
        
        canvasCtx.restore();
      });
    }
  }
  
  // Keep looping independent of video play state so pausing works naturally
  window.requestAnimationFrame(renderLoop);
}

// Start watching for frames immediately
window.requestAnimationFrame(renderLoop);
</script>
